name: @barlevalon/plannotator-setup-goal-skill
description_en: Turn an idea or objective into a goal package for /goal. Interviews the user, builds a reviewed fact sheet via Plannotator, then explores the codebase to produce an execution plan.
description_zh: 将想法或目标转换为 /goal 的目标包。采访用户，通过 Plannotator 构建经过审查的信息表，然后探索代码库以生成执行计划
